title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Claude Cowork is a workspace architecture system that transforms Claude into an AI-powered operating system for work. It uses persistent memory, CLAUDE.md instruction files, and a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects to create an AI Second Brain for productivity tasks like email management, expense tracking, and content drafting.
